activities.details: I levelled my Herblore skill, I am now level 73.
I levelled my Smithing skill, I am now level 48.
Completing Dwarf Cannon has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 60 QP milestone.
I helped defend a dwarven outpost against goblins. Once I had repaired the dwarf cannon, the goblins stood no chance!
I levelled my Construction skill, I am now level 51.
I now have a total level of 1000, split among all my skills.

I killed 3 boss monsters   called:  Lexicus Runewright , Har'Lakk the Riftsplitter and Stomp  in Daemonheim.
activities.text: I killed 3 boss monsters in Daemonheim.
